prompt: The rate limiting implementation is complete — move it to code review.

fixture.description: Backlog with one item in 'in-progress' that has passed through all required prior gates (backlog, refined, ready).

assertions: The item's status is updated to 'code-review'
The previous status ('in-progress') is appended to lane_history
The lane_history entry includes a 'by' field with a non-empty value
The version field in backlog.json is incremented
Claude confirms the move to code review
